metadata.description: Brightness and contrast adjustment - simple math formulas

summary: Adjusts color brightness and contrast. Formulas: Bright = Color + Brightness; Contrast = (Color - 0.5) * Contrast + 0.5
implementation: Two nodes - Add for brightness, then math for contrast
compatibility_loss_20_percent: Minor non-linear differences in how extreme values are clamped
typical_use: Color correction, lighting adjustment, visibility control
